equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-07-23 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 39.66
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-07-23: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 39.66/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and equity signal shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-07-23, the score printed 39.66/100 in the elevated regime, with front-end rate pressure and equity signal doing most of the work.
